# ================================================================
# ADVANCED CONCEPT: Scheduled workflow + dependency audit
#
# Runs every night to catch NEW vulnerabilities in existing deps
# even when no code has changed. Critical for compliance.
# ================================================================

name: Nightly Security Audit

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 1 * * *"        # 1 AM UTC every night
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  audit:
    name: Dependency Audit
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    permissions:
      contents: read
      issues: write             # to auto-create GitHub issues on findings

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: "21"
          distribution: temurin

      # ADVANCED: OWASP audit with auto-issue creation
      - name: Run OWASP Dependency Check
        run: |
          mvn org.owasp:dependency-check-maven:check \
            -DfailBuildOnCVSS=7 \
            -DsuppressionFile=.github/owasp-suppressions.xml || AUDIT_FAILED=true

          echo "AUDIT_FAILED=${AUDIT_FAILED:-false}" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      # ADVANCED: Auto-create a GitHub Issue if vulnerabilities found
      # So the team sees it in the issue tracker, not just in pipeline logs
      - name: Create issue on vulnerability found
        if: env.AUDIT_FAILED == 'true'
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
            const title = `[Security] Dependency vulnerabilities found — ${today}`;

            // Check if issue already open to avoid duplicates
            const { data: issues } = await github.rest.issues.listForRepo({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              state: 'open',
              labels: 'security'
            });

            const existing = issues.find(i => i.title === title);
            if (!existing) {
              await github.rest.issues.create({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                title,
                body: `The nightly OWASP dependency audit found vulnerabilities with CVSS >= 7.\n\n**Workflow run:** ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}\n\nPlease review the dependency-check report and update affected dependencies.`,
                labels: ['security', 'automated']
              });
            }
